since_last: 93% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 93% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.57% · Gold -0.69% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 93% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.97%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.97%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +3.97%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +3.97%, AMAT +3.72%, LRCX +3.33%, AVAV +3.30%, TLN +3.19%. Laggards: AES -0.47%, D -0.09%, MU -0.05%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.96% at $156.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
